title: Which realtime protocol won’t melt your stack?
meta_description: Pick the realtime protocol that fits your latency budget and budget in 2026 — SSE beats WebSocket on cost and ops load for scoreboards, chat, and dashboards
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams pick WebSocket because it’s ‘real-time’ then burn $8 k+ on keep-alive traffic.

SSE on a $0.42 EC2 node just handled 120 k March Madness users.

https://kubaik.github.io/which-realtime-protocol-wont-melt-your-stack

#AI #WebSockets #RealTime

What broke first when you tried this?
